description: Where a bar is placed on the body, distinguishing a movement from its sibling variations (variation facet, §6.3). Distinct from stance (foot/body position), which never co-occurs with barPosition on the same exercise in data/exercises.json. Open token; unknown values round-trip (§3.3, §5.9). Includes 'high-bar' and 'front', already in use in data/exercises.json (back squat, front squat).

tokens.label: High-Bar
tokens.description: Bar rests on the upper trapezius (high-bar back squat).

tokens.label: Low-Bar
tokens.description: Bar rests lower, across the rear/posterior deltoids (low-bar back squat).

tokens.label: Front Rack
tokens.description: Bar rests across the front deltoids/clavicles (front squat).

tokens.label: Safety Squat Bar
tokens.description: A cambered/yoke bar that rests on the shoulders with front-loaded handles (safety squat bar, SSB).
